description: Water intrusion within 12 inches of any electrical component — MUST be confirmed via camera or tenant that electrical is nearby
bis_notes: A1=Violation Served, D5=Emergency Response Team, D9=Electrical Unit, J4=Hazardous Follow-Up

description: Mold growth CONFIRMED exceeding 10 square feet — must be verified by tenant or clearly visible in camera
bis_notes: A1=Violation Served, F3=Referred to DOHMH, F8=Referred to HPD

description: Mold growth under 10 square feet or unconfirmed size — cosmetic/minor health concern
Failure to provide adequate heat (68°F day / 55°F night Oct–May)
bis_notes: A1=Violation Served, D5=Emergency Response Team, J4=Hazardous Follow-Up

description: Failure to supply hot water at minimum 120°F
bis_notes: A1=Violation Served, D2=Plumbing Unit, J4=Hazardous Follow-Up

description: Structural failure or imminent collapse risk
bis_notes: A1=Violation Served, D5=Emergency Response, EC=Structurally Compromised Unit, J4=Hazardous Follow-Up, RH=Emergency Declaration

description: Evidence of pest infestation requiring extermination
bis_notes: A1=Violation Served, F3=Referred to DOHMH, F8=Referred to HPD

description: Failure to maintain secure locks on entry doors
bis_notes: A1=Violation Served, D5=Emergency Response Team, J4=Hazardous Follow-Up

description: Peeling lead-based paint in unit with child under 6
bis_notes: A1=Violation Served, F3=Referred to DOHMH, F8=Referred to HPD, J4=Hazardous Follow-Up
A1=Violation Served, D5=Emergency Response, G6=Referred to FDNY, RI=Immediate Emergency Declaration

description: Elevator out of service in building over 6 stories
Broken or missing window pane creating weather exposure
Missing or non-functional smoke or CO detector
bis_notes: A1=Violation Served, G6=Referred to FDNY, J4=Hazardous Follow-Up

description: Illegal conversion creating substandard living conditions
bis_notes: A1=Violation Served, D1=Construction Enforcement, MG=Occupancy Contrary to C of O

description: Sewage backup or overflow creating health hazard
bis_notes: A1=Violation Served, D2=Plumbing Unit, D5=Emergency Response, F1=Referred to DEP

description: General paint or plaster deterioration (non-lead context)
Water leak or intrusion NOT near electrical components — still hazardous but not immediately dangerous
bis_notes: A1=Violation Served, D2=Plumbing Unit, F8=Referred to HPD
